description: Explicit UI contract for the Provider portal /docs route.

header.title: Documentation
header.subtitle: Guides, references and runbooks for providers.

no_rows.body_text: Documentation is being prepared. Check back soon.

non_negotiables: Page uses a 2-column card grid (p-grid p-grid-2).
Each card is rendered as an <a> element — the entire card is the clickable surface.
Each card has only a head (no body block beyond title + sub + corner icon).
Card sub line composes '${kind} · updated ${updated}' (note Unicode middle dot U+00B7, NOT a hyphen-minus).
Em dash (U+2014) in titles like 'Eval harness — submitting benchmarks' must be preserved.
The arrow-up-right icon is decorative; production must set aria-hidden="true".
Production must replace href="#" stub with the canonical doc URL.
